TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Recep_Tayyip_Erdoğan, title = Recep_Tayyip_Erdoğan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Recep_Tayyip_Erdoğan} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Turkey ta' misuw hya' ga Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Turkey ta' misuw hya' ga Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, aring ryax tay 28 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, reʦ~ʨep tajjip er*o*an, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw turkej taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa reʦ~ʨep tajjip er*o*an, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
